title: ModalDynamics
description: ModalDynamics: General modal dynamics result of the structure.

Frequency.description: Property has a quantity of type Frequency meassured in [Hz].

ModalMass.description: Property has a quantity of type Mass meassured in [kg].

ModalStiffness.description: Property has a quantity of type ForcePerUnitLength meassured in [N/m].

MassRatioX.description: Property has a quantity of type Ratio meassured in [-].

MassRatioY.description: Property has a quantity of type Ratio meassured in [-].

MassRatioZ.description: Property has a quantity of type Ratio meassured in [-].

InertiaRatioX.description: Property has a quantity of type Ratio meassured in [-].

InertiaRatioY.description: Property has a quantity of type Ratio meassured in [-].

InertiaRatioZ.description: Property has a quantity of type Ratio meassured in [-].

ModeNumber.description: Positive index, starting at one. Only set for cases with modal outputs such as dynamic cases.

TimeStep.description: Time step for time history results.

_t.description: Optional Type discirminator for BHoM type.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional Version of BHoM used when generating the object.
